#  Respond to an RFI (Android) 
##  Things to Consider 
  * [Required User Permissions](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/rfi-project/permissions)


##  Steps 
  1. Navigate to the **RFIs** tool using the Procore app on an Android mobile device.
  2. Tap the RFI you want to respond to.
  3. Tap **Add Response**.
  4. Enter your response.
  5. _Optional:_ Attach one or more files to the RFI using the following options.
     * **Camera:** Tap to open your device's camera and take a photo.
     * ![Icon Photo Circle Mobile](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/f31c0e5d8ea081472e5e1dc6a62b71e8/e57ca3814ae9c17c66a721176f52c678/icon-photo-circle-mobile.png?fm=webp&h=30) **Photos:** Tap to select an image from your device's photo library.
     * **Files:** Tap to select a saved file from your device's files.
     * ![Icon Attachment](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/a0abf979bb67cad2c3e4211985fe4152/3323b1ff0e4747785ad230c33d046023/icon-attachment.png?fm=webp&h=17) **Document Management:** Tap to select a file from the [Document Management tool](https://v2.support.procore.com/faq-what-is-the-difference-between-document-management-attachments-and-attachments-from-other-tools) if your company has access to this tool.
  6. Tap **Send** to add your response to the RFI.  
Your response is added to the RFI's **Activity** section and the system sends email notifications according to the project's settings. See [When does the RFIs tool send email notifications?](https://v2.support.procore.com/faq-when-does-the-rfis-tool-send-email-notifications)


## See Also
  * [RFIs (Android) - Overview](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/rfis-android)
  * [Create a Change Event from an RFI (Android)](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/rfis-android/tutorials/create-a-change-event-from-an-rfi-android)
  * [Mark an RFI Response as Official (Android)](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/rfis-android/tutorials/mark-an-rfi-response-as-official-android)
title: Respond to an RFI (Android)
description: How to respond to an RFI on your Android mobile device.
